text:
(In reply to Fernando Apesteguía from comment #3)

Ah ha!  I thought that was what the acronym meant, but I took it to mean something a little different!  Thank you for clarifying :D 

Yes, since we already have 0.104.2 in 2022Q4 I believe that this patch should also go into that branch :)
